family_summary: Repair-pass family bundle separating the southern 1983-2005 war, the Darfur 2003-2005 counterinsurgency/mass-atrocity core, and the 2023-present SAF-RSF war into bounded denominator frames rather than a single whole-Sudan rollup.
notes: Ongoing-family repair pass current as of 2026-03-09. Ongoing episodes use 2026-03-09 as an as-of date rather than a terminal historical end.
